name: Batch Order Processing
body: [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/BatchOrderProcessing.05T5g00000gQCunEAG.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/BatchOrderProcessing.05T5g00000gQCunEAG.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "User-added image"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by "}, {"text": "Maropost", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you need help with this add-on,"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know!"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}], "data-id": "overview"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Create consignments (labels) for orders in batches and mark dispatched at the click of a button. For large order volumes, this can speed up your order processing by creating multiple consignment numbers in one easy step."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up the Batch Order Processing Add-on"}], "data-id": "setup-instructions"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To install the batch order processing add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the order management section, find "}, {"text": "Batch Order Processing", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click the install button."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "To remove the add-on, click the "}, {"text": "Uninstall", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once installed, the "}, {"text": "Bulk Pick", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Bulk Create Consignments & Dispatch", "bold": true}, {"text": " buttons will appear at the bottom of the order listing in the control panel. For more information on processing orders in bulk see "}, {"text": "this article"}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Only "}, {"text": "Bulk Pick", "bold": true}, {"text": " will appear in the "}, {"text": "New", "bold": true}, {"text": " orders list."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/BatchOrderProcessing1.05T5g00000gQFRbEAO.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/BatchOrderProcessing1.05T5g00000gQFRbEAO.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
